name: Form Designer Flow — Creator can open and view the form builder canvas

planSteps.description: Enter the email 'mrmadhukar@gmail.com' in the email field and the password 'Madhukar@2002' in the password field, then log in
On the forms list dashboard, locate and click the edit link or card for the first active form
The URL changes to end with '/edit', showing that the builder view has loaded
The fields palette or sidebar showing options like 'Short text' and 'Rating Scale' is visible on the page
